description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named utils that triggers on push to utils/**, examples/**, and .github/workflows/utils.yml, as well as workflow dispatch. Run a Windows job that clones the repository and submodules, gets the current date, commit hash, and count, clones libmysofa, sets up MSBuild, restores and builds libmysofa NuGet packages, configures and builds with CMake, collects artifacts, uploads them, compresses them, and creates a pre-release with automatic tagging.
